subject: ONAP Python SDK tests should generate JSON artifact (next to HTML)
commit_message:
ONAP Python SDK tests should generate JSON artifact (next to HTML)

Generation of report file in JSON format

Issue-ID: INT-2235
Signed-off-by: pawel.denst <pawel.denst@external.t-mobile.pl>
Signed-off-by: Lukasz Rajewski <lukasz.rajewski@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: Ib99a0cb8bf317633e19a4a2e1c41d611a3b9f343

Patch Set 15: Code-Review-2

Please fix the testcase basic_network.
    All exceptions should be caught by the testcase instead!
  
    Traceback (most recent call last):
      File "/usr/lib/python3.8/site-packages/xtesting/ci/run_tests.py", line 178, in run_test
        test_case.clean()
      File "/usr/lib/python3.8/site-packages/onaptests/scenario/basic_network.py", line 62, in clean
        self.test.reports_collection.generate_report()
      File "/usr/lib/python3.8/site-packages/onaptests/steps/reports_collection.py", line 103, in generate_report
        report_dict['steps'].sort(key=lambda step: int(''.join(filter(str.isdigit, step['description']))))
      File "/usr/lib/python3.8/site-packages/onaptests/steps/reports_collection.py", line 103, in <lambda>
        report_dict['steps'].sort(key=lambda step: int(''.join(filter(str.isdigit, step['description']))))
    ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: ''

Error on code. It breaks
